headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ): The Most Oversold Strong Buy-Rated Stock to Invest In Now
summary: Nasdaq, Inc. (NASDAQ:NDAQ) is one of the 9 Most Oversold Strong Buy-Rated Stocks to Invest In Now. On June 22, TD Cowen lowered its price target on Nasdaq, Inc. (NASDAQ:NDAQ) to $98 from $104 and kept a Buy rating. TD Cowen cut price targets for most of its exchange coverage, saying the emergence of perpetual […]
